headline: Assessing EQT (EQT) Valuation As Mixed Recent Returns Put The Stock Back In Focus
summary: Why EQT (EQT) is on investors’ radar now EQT (EQT) is drawing fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at US$59.47 and showing mixed returns over the past week, month, and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for EQT. While the recent 1-month share price return of a 3.8% decline suggests some momentum has cooled, EQT’s 90-day share price return of 16.4% and 1-year total shareholder return of 24.1% point to a stronger underlying trend over longer...
